pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with the migration target.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 semantics, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring newer bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok (like 1.18.4) do not support Java 21 bytecode generation and will cause compilation errors or runtime failures when used with JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to ensure compatibility between Lombok and MapStruct on Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct may fail to process Lombok-generated getters/setters correctly in newer Java versions due to changes in how annotations are processed or bytecode is generated.

src/main/java/com/dms/service/DocumentFi.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for file path construction.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
